title: Update Meshtastic compatibility contract for current app sync flow
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.1 research found the current Meshtastic app flow needs heartbeat/queueStatus, metadata, region_presets, moduleConfig/device UI config, and Apple's two-phase config/database sync, which are not fully captured in the existing compatibility notes. What needs to be done: update the Meshtastic-to-LICHEN mapping contract with these protobuf messages, nonce handling, FromNum drain behavior, and explicit unsupported-write policy. Acceptance criteria: mapping table covers ToRadio want_config_id/heartbeat/packet/disconnect and FromRadio my_info/node_info/metadata/region_presets/channel/config/moduleConfig/config_complete_id/queueStatus/packet/clientNotification; Android, Apple, and Python client expectations are cited by source commit; unsupported writes have deterministic responses.
notes: 2026-06-30 updated docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md for current Meshtastic app sync contract. Added source baseline commits from project-LICHEN-t2hn.1, raw BLE/FromNum drain semantics, Android/iOS two-stage nonces 69420/69421, Python/legacy full-sync behavior for other nonces, heartbeat tolerance, required FromRadio mapping including metadata/region_presets/moduleConfig/channel/config_complete_id/queueStatus/packet/clientNotification, app-visible ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK versus local-only queueStatus, read-only admin compatibility responses, deterministic unsupported write/no-op behavior, and disabled secondary-channel read behavior. Sidecar source review Fermat confirmed local expectations and gaps. Sidecar implementation-gap review Schrodinger found stale/uncompiled Rust config_handler.rs plus existing implementation gaps; created follow-up project-LICHEN-t2hn.20. Review pass 1 Anscombe found region_presets and unsupported-portnum ambiguity; fixed by requiring region_presets in stage 1 and replacing silent drop language. Review pass 2 Erdos found read-only admin contradiction and secondary-channel ambiguity; fixed. Review pass 3 Lovelace found unknown nonce empty-stage compatibility bug for Python/older clients; fixed to legacy/full sync. Verification: ruby line-length guard passed; git diff --check passed; targeted rg confirmed fixed contract terms.
close_reason: Updated Meshtastic compatibility contract for current app sync flow, recorded source baselines, deterministic sync/admin/unsupported behavior, and completed three independent review passes with fixes.
